## Submission checklist

- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] The wrapper is maintained and works with the current upstream API.
- [ ] The wrapper has docs with installation and usage examples.
- [ ] The wrapper has a license.
- [ ] The row links to both a package page and a GitHub repository.
- [ ] The row is in the correct category and sorted alphabetically by `Name`.
- [ ] The note is factual, short, and free of marketing language.
- [ ] This PR does not add stars, downloads, latest release dates, or other manually stale metadata.
- [ ] This PR is not spam, paid placement, or affiliate promotion.

## Entry row

```markdown
| repo-name | API name | TypeScript | Official | [npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/example) | [GitHub](https://github.com/owner/repo) | Short factual note. |
```
